findings.content_text: the first comprehensive regional digital-economy treaty among developing economies (modular 8-pillar architecture)
findings.source_passage: will be the world's first comprehensive regional digital economy treaty among developing and emerging-market countries when concluded … under active negotiation through 2023–2024 (with conclusion targeted for 2025)
findings.finding: The source uses unambiguous future tense ('will be…when concluded') and notes the treaty was still under negotiation with a 2025 target. The wiki drops the futurity and presents the DEFA as a present-tense, achieved status.
findings.required_action: Revise to: 'will be the first comprehensive regional digital-economy treaty among developing economies once concluded (negotiating rounds 2023–2024, target 2025)' — or equivalent language that preserves the source's 'not yet concluded' status.

findings.content_text: the first comprehensive regional digital-economy treaty among developing economies (modular 8-pillar architecture)
findings.source_passage: will be the world's first comprehensive regional digital economy treaty among developing and emerging-market countries when concluded
findings.finding: Same temporal distortion as CLM-ASEAN-01. This bullet in the CA7 hub page drops the source's future-tense qualifier.
findings.required_action: Correct to match source's future tense and add '(under negotiation; targeted conclusion 2025)'.

findings.content_text: the first comprehensive regional digital-economy treaty among developing economies
findings.source_passage: will be the world's first comprehensive regional digital economy treaty among developing and emerging-market countries when concluded
findings.finding: The HTML file renders the same erroneous present-tense claim as the wiki source pages. Since the HTML is generated from the wiki, fixing the wiki pages will fix the HTML on regeneration.
findings.required_action: Regenerate wiki.html after correcting the wiki source pages.
